headline: Allegion (ALLE) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: The Allegion team has remained agile in a volatile environment and stayed focused on serving our customers alongside our strong channel partners.  In Q1, we delivered high single-digit revenue growth, led by the Americas nonresidential business and contributions from acquisitions.  In the Americas, performance was in line with our expectations we outlined back in February.

headline: Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
summary: Security hardware provider Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 9.7% year on year to $1.03 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.80 per share was 5.1% below analysts’ consensus estimates.
